project.name: PropManager Security Remediation
project.description: Migrate per-tenant credentials from .env to database storage. Implement System Admin dashboard for platform-level settings. Follows multi-tenant SaaS security best practices.

qualityStandards.description: Security-critical changes require extra verification and audit logging.
principles: All secret keys MUST use Laravel's encrypted cast
Secret keys NEVER passed to frontend
All credential changes logged via Auditable trait
Backward compatibility during migration (fallback to .env if not in DB)
Write failing test FIRST for each migration

credential_migration.description: Move per-tenant credentials from .env to database

admin_dashboard.description: System Admin dashboard for platform settings

items.title: Migrate Paystack Credentials to Database
items.description: Move PAYSTACK_PUBLIC_KEY and PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY from .env to payment_configurations table. Each landlord will configure their own Paystack account via Settings UI.
steps: Create migration to add paystack_public_key, paystack_secret_key columns to payment_configurations
Update PaymentConfiguration model with new fields and encrypted cast for secret
Add helper method hasPaystackFullConfig()
Update PaystackService to accept landlord-specific config OR fallback to .env
Update PaymentMethodsTab.vue to include Paystack key inputs
Write tests for backward compatibility
acceptance_criteria: Paystack keys stored encrypted in database
Landlords can configure keys via Settings UI
Existing .env config continues to work as fallback
Secret key never exposed to frontend
definition_of_done: PaystackService uses landlord config when available
Tests pass for both DB and .env scenarios

items.title: Migrate M-Pesa Consumer Credentials to Database
items.description: Move MPESA_CONSUMER_KEY and MPESA_CONSUMER_SECRET from .env to payment_configurations. These are Safaricom app credentials that each landlord registers.
steps: Create migration to add mpesa_consumer_key, mpesa_consumer_secret to payment_configurations
Update PaymentConfiguration model with encrypted secret
Update MpesaService to accept landlord-specific config
Update PaymentMethodsTab.vue with M-Pesa API credentials section
Maintain backward compatibility with .env fallback
acceptance_criteria: Consumer credentials stored encrypted per landlord
OAuth token generation uses landlord credentials
Backward compatibility with .env maintained
definition_of_done: STK Push works with per-landlord credentials

items.title: Migrate M-Pesa B2C Credentials to Database
items.description: Move MPESA_B2C_* variables (initiator, password, security_credential) from .env to payment_configurations. B2C is used for refunds.
steps: Create migration for B2C columns (initiator, password, security_credential, result_url, timeout_url)
Update PaymentConfiguration model
Update MpesaService B2C methods
Add B2C section to PaymentMethodsTab.vue
acceptance_criteria: B2C credentials stored encrypted
Refunds work with per-landlord config
Security credential properly encrypted

items.title: Create System Admin Dashboard
items.description: Create admin dashboard for PropManager platform settings. Super admins can configure platform-level settings that apply across all tenants.
steps: Create database/migrations for platform_settings table (key, value, encrypted, description)
Create app/Models/PlatformSetting.php model
Create app/Http/Controllers/Admin/PlatformSettingsController.php
Create resources/js/Pages/Admin/PlatformSettings.vue
Add route and navigation
acceptance_criteria: Super admins can access platform settings
Settings grouped by category (payments, email, security, etc.)
Sensitive settings encrypted and masked in UI
Changes logged to audit log
definition_of_done: Settings can be viewed and updated

items.title: Move Platform Payment Wallets to Admin Settings
items.description: Move INTASEND_PLATFORM_WALLET_ID and similar platform fee collection wallets from .env to PlatformSettings table, configurable via Admin dashboard.
steps: Create seeder for platform payment settings
Update config/intasend.php to read from PlatformSetting model
Add Platform Payments section to Admin/PlatformSettings.vue
Update any services that use platform wallet IDs
acceptance_criteria: Platform wallet IDs configurable via Admin UI
Platform fee percentages configurable
Changes take effect without deployment

items.title: Implement Credential Access Logging
items.description: Log all access to sensitive credentials (not values, just access events). Alert on suspicious patterns like repeated access failures.
steps: Create middleware or service decorator for credential access logging
Log: who accessed, what credential type, when, IP address
Create alert rules for suspicious patterns
Add credential access report to Admin dashboard
acceptance_criteria: All credential access logged (not values)
Alerts for >10 failed accesses in 5 minutes
Admin can view access logs

items.title: Remove Deprecated .env Variables
items.description: After SEC-001 through SEC-003 are deployed and verified, remove deprecated per-tenant credential variables from .env.example and add deprecation warnings.
steps: Add deprecation warnings in config files when .env fallback is used
Update .env.example to remove per-tenant credential placeholders
Add migration guide to CLAUDE.md
Schedule removal of .env fallback in future version
acceptance_criteria: Deprecation warnings logged when .env used for per-tenant creds
.env.example only contains platform-level vars
Documentation updated

executionOrder: SEC-002 - Migrate M-Pesa consumer creds (depends: SEC-001)
SEC-003 - Migrate M-Pesa B2C creds (depends: SEC-002)
SEC-005 - Platform wallets to Admin (depends: SEC-004)

metrics: All per-tenant credentials stored in database with encryption
